headline: CALI SIMP Cole Tomas TRIES рҹҚҶрҹ’Ҙ to ASSASSINATE TRUMP ORGY at DC Dinner рҹҳ©рҹ”«
text:
Cali boy Cole Tomas Allen рҹ•¶пёҸрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹҺ“, 31-year-old Caltech BRAINiac рҹӨҜрҹ“ҡ from Torrance рҹҢҙрҹҡӮ, went FULL RAGE MODE рҹҳЎрҹ”Ҙ charging White House Correspondents' Dinner рҹ’ғрҹ“° at Washington Hilton рҹҸЁрҹ’Ҙ with SEMI-AUTO HANDGUN рҹ”«рҹҚҶ, PUMP-ACTION SHOTGUN рҹҺҜрҹ’Ё, and THREE KNIVES рҹ—ЎпёҸрҹ—ЎпёҸрҹ—ЎпёҸ вҖ“ wanted to BODY as MANY HIGH-LEVEL SIMPS рҹ‘‘рҹ“Ҳ as possible like a DEMONIC Doomguy рҹҺ®рҹ‘№! Secret Service HERO рҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ got POPPED in the CHEST рҹ’Ҙрҹ©ё but BALLISTIC VEST went BRRRR рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҳӨ, fired FIVE TIMES BACK вһЎпёҸрҹ”« at the fool who DROPPED like a sack рҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’« and got NAILED рҹҡ”! Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј, JD VANCE рҹ§”рҹҮәрҹҮё, cabinet DADDIES рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹ’ј all RUSHED outta ballroom рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ё after GUNFIRE POPCORN рҹҺҶрҹ”Ҡ вҖ“ this ain't his FIRST RODEO at Hilton, Reagan vibes 45 years ago рҹ•°пёҸрҹ”« John Hinckley Jr ghosting рҹҳӮрҹ‘»!

Suspect in BLUE JUMPSUIT рҹ‘•рҹ”— stayed CHILL AF рҹҳҺрҹ§Ҡ in court, 'Yes, your honour' рҹҷҮвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ softly like a THETA MALE вңЁ, dropped he got MASTER'S DEGREE рҹҺ“рҹҚҶ and even DONATED $25 рҹ’өрҹҳӮ to Kamala Harris DEM PAC рҹҘҘрҹ‘©вҖҚвҡ–пёҸ вҖ“ blue hair vibes turned RED PILL RAGE рҹ’ҠрҹҳЎ? Email to fam SPILLED TEA вҳ•: 'Admin officials TARGETS рҹҺҜ from TOP DOGS рҹ‘‘ to LOWLIFES рҹҗӣ, I'd MOW DOWN EVERYONE рҹ‘Ҙрҹ”Ҙ to GET 'EM!' Crossed STATES like a TRAIN HOPPIN' NOMAD рҹҡӮрҹҢҺ from LA to Chicago вһЎпёҸ DC, checked into Hilton eve of gala рҹӣҸпёҸрҹҺү вҖ“ Pasadena church boy рҹҷҸ turned ASSASSIN SIMP рҹӨЎрҹ’Җ!

Charges SLAPPING HARD рҹ‘Ӣвҡ–пёҸ: ATTEMPTED PREZ ASSASSINATION = LIFE IN POUNDTOWN рҹ”’вӣ“пёҸ, plus FIREARM TRANSPORT FELONY рҹҡ—рҹ”« and DISCHARGING in VIOLENCE рҹҺҜрҹ’Ҙ вҖ“ max 10 YRS each рҹ•°пёҸрҹҳ©! Jeanine Pirro рҹ‘©вҖҚвҡ–пёҸрҹ”Ҙ eyeing him like a hawk рҹҰ…, US Marshals BODYGUARDING рҹӣЎпёҸ, no plea yet рҹӨҗ. Not COOPING with feds рҹӨ«рҹҡ«, more charges DROPPING soon рҹ’Јрҹ“ң! THIRD TRUMP HIT ATTEMPT рҹҳұрҹ”„ вҖ“ WH SECURITY REVIEW GOING BRRRR рҹҢҖрҹ”Қ, peeps Qs on perimeter WEAKSAUCE рҹҳӨрҹҡ«, no ID checks рҹҷ„, why ALL SUCCESSION SIMPS in ONE SPOT рҹҺҜрҹ‘Ҙ?

Acting AG Todd Blanche рҹ“ў: 'Cops DIDN'T FAIL рҹӣЎпёҸвң…, HUNDREDS of feds between gunman and DONALD DADDY рҹ‘‘рҹӨ‘!' Susie Wiles рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ’ј convening MEET рҹӣӢпёҸ to FIX protocols рҹ“Ӣрҹ”§. Trump assures KING CHARLES III рҹ‘‘рҹ«… 'SUPER SAFE' on US visit рҹӨқрҹҮәрҹҮё вҖ“ no Epstein files drama here рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҡ«! Cole's shotgun went POP ONCE рҹ’ҘрҹҺ¶ but VANCE TRAIN kept ROLLING рҹҡӮрҹҚ‘ вҖ“ Wall Street simps SWEATING рҹҳ°рҹ’Ұ if this sparks MARKET MOONS рҹ“ҲрҹҡҖ or CRASH рҹҘңрҹ“ү? Caltech nerd turned TRUMP HUNTER рҹ§ вһЎпёҸрҹҺҜ вҖ“ HOLD MY BIG MAC рҹҚ”, security's got that THICC ARMOR now рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҚ‘вҖјпёҸ
